@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "gitea-23668-actions-manually-trigger-a-workflow-action",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "gitea: Actions - Manually trigger a workflow/action",
+    "description": "Actions - Manually trigger a workflow/action. Requested by 176+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current gitea setup",
+        "description": "Verify your gitea version and configuration:\n```bash\ngitea --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working gitea installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review gitea configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant gitea configuration:\n### Feature Description\n\nHey!\n\nIt would be very nice if we could have a button here to trigger a specific workflow/action:\n\nSo that I could trigger a job quickly, without having to push or waiting for a schedule."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Actions - Manually trigger a workflow/action",
+        "description": "Add `workflow_dispatch` support to your Gitea Actions workflow so it can be triggered manually from the UI. PR #28163 added a 'Run workflow' button that appears when a workflow includes the `workflow_dispatch` event.\n\nExample workflow configuration with manual trigger inputs:\n```yaml\nname: Docker Image CI\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      logLevel:\n        description: 'Log level'\n        required: true\n        default: 'warning'\n        type: choice\n        options:\n        - info\n        - warning\n        - debug\n      tags:\n        description: 'Test scenario tags'\n        required: false\n        type: boolean\n```\nOnce configured, admins can trigger the workflow from the Actions tab by selecting the workflow and clicking 'Run workflow'."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Actions - Manually trigger a workflow/action\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "PR #28163 added support for manually triggering workflows via `workflow_dispatch` in Gitea Actions. When a workflow includes the `workflow_dispatch` event, admins see a 'Run workflow' button in the Actions UI. The implementation supports input types including choice, boolean, string, and environment, matching GitHub Actions compatibility.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "on:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      logLevel:\n        description: 'Log level'\n        required: true\n        default: 'warning'\n        type: choice\n        options:\n        - info\n        - warning\n        - debug\n      tags:\n        description: 'Test scenario tags'\n        required: false\n        type: boolean"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+    ],

+    },

+  },
